rows.label: tev036701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Wersal about Ma-non clothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Wersal about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Wersal about Ma-non clothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0001
rows.name:
As thin and light as our clothes
are, they are still exceedingly
durable, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0002
rows.name:
But they're not anywhere near as interesting
as your Earth fashion, right? They don't make
a a a statement, I suppose you might say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0003
rows.name:
That's why I've been dying to to try on Alesa's clothes.
I don't care if they're fit for space travel—just
browsing the store racks makes me happy, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0008
rows.name:
Normally, we Ma-non don't fuss over how we look,
you see? So I guess the only one of us who really
understands my love for fashion is is Panyal?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0009
rows.name:
You haven't met her? Oh. Maybe
you need to get around more?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0010
rows.name:
Panyal has been to just about every
clothing store in the city, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0011
rows.name:
She said she was going to develop a
clothing line just for Ma-non, so I
hope that's still in the works?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0020
rows.name:
If I designed ground gear for humans, I'd probably
use the thinnest, most transparent fabric I could
and cover up only what I had to, maybe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0021
rows.name:
...What's that? You'd
be practically naked?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0022
rows.name:
Er, does that even matter? I mean,
it's it's not like you're displaying
your real body, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0023
rows.name:
Sometimes you humans just don't
make any sense at all, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Wersal about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0024
rows.name:
As thin and light as our clothes
are, they are still exceedingly
durable, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0025
rows.name:
But they're not anywhere as interesting as
your Earth fashion, right? They don't make
a statement, I suppose you might say...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0026
rows.name:
That's why I've been dying to to try on Alesa's clothes.
I don't care if they're fit for space travel—just
browsing the store racks makes me happy, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0033
rows.name:
I guess you heard? Panyal's
attempt at at designing
unmentionables was a royal bust...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0034
rows.name:
I considering buying some, but Alesa said
to stay clear, so I passed. That was probably
the right choice, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0035
rows.name:
However, this perfume Panyal came
up with instead is a real winner,
right? It smells so so so nice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0038
rows.name:
She'll always be a pioneer to me. I
mean, where would Ma-non fashion be
without her? Nowhere, am I right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0051
rows.name:
If I designed ground gear for humans, I'd probably
use the thinnest, most transparent fabric I could
and cover up only what I had to, maybe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0052
rows.name:
...What's that? You'd
be practically naked?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0053
rows.name:
Er, does that even matter? I mean,
it's it's not like you're displaying
your real body, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036701_MSG0054
rows.name:
Sometimes you humans just don't
make any sense at all, you know?[ST:wait ]
